part.text:
---
## Goal
- Move `AnyAuthenticatedUserId` and `RecoveryUserId` const definitions from `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/perms` to `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/globals`, update all usages across repository

## Constraints & Preferences
- Project must typecheck after change
- Apply changes across whole repository

## Progress
### Done
- Created new constants in `globals/agent.go`:
  - `AnyAuthenticatedUserId = "USER_AUTHENTICATED"`
  - `RecoveryUserId = "USER_RECOVERY"`

### In Progress
- Updating all usages to reference globals package instead of internal/perms
- Deleting old const definitions from `internal/perms/acl.go` (lines 12, 14)

### Blocked
- Attempted upsert_decl/delete operations on `internal/perms/acl.go` failed with syntax/validation errors
- View/ref attempts for patching failed - tools rejecting unknown $ref and non-parseable declarations

## Key Decisions
- New constants defined in `globals/agent.go` generation 2 and 3, packages rechecked after each addition
- Old constants need deletion from source but tool commands being rejected (decl syntax, invalid refs)

## Next Steps
1. Complete deletion of old const definitions from `internal/perms/acl.go` using working deletion operations
2. Update all usages to import globals package and reference new locations
3. Verify project typechecks after migration

## Critical Context
- Search showed 4 refs for AnyAuthenticatedUserId, 10+ refs for RecoveryUserId (truncated output)
- Old definitions at: `internal/perms/acl.go:12` (AnyAuthenticatedUserId), `:14` (RecoveryUserId)
- Refs found in: internal/daemon/controller/auth/*, internal/iam/repository_scope.go, internal/daemon/controller/handlers/*
- globals package already has other const definitions like AccountIdField, UserIdField in fields.go

## Relevant Files
- `/boundary/globals/agent.go`: New constant definitions (done)
- `/boundary/internal/perms/acl.go`: Old const definitions to delete
- `/boundary/internal/iam/repository_scope.go`, `/boundary/internal/daemon/controller/*`: Usage sites to update
